top_signals.title: Ethio Telecom Lists on Bourse, Marking Ethiopia’s First IPO
top_signals.summary: Ethio telecom listed on Ethiopia’s nascent stock market more than a year since the close of its initial public offering and marking the nation’s maiden IPO.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
